title: How do update a column automatically by another column in another board once an item is moved to specific group

posts.author: mirmelsh (Roi Mirmelshtein)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Guys

I have a timeline column in one board which I’d like to be auto populated from another timeline column in another board once I move an item to a specific group in the board.
It seems like a combination of board/column mirroring & automation but I’m struggling to make it work

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@mirmelsh

This one is a bit tricky.

posts.author: mirmelsh (Roi Mirmelshtein)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks Jim !!!
Seems like the solution I need but my organization unfortunately does not allow to add column magic app…can you think of a way to do this using built in Monday automations?
